likely_misread: TH-1 'assert the gate REFUSES with exit 2': a sloppy executor asserts only returncode==2. In promotion_gate.py exit 2 is returned by 4+ unrelated paths (refusal_reasons non-empty L722, semi-auto window inactive L729, source BLOCKED L740, and the unconditional 'unattended --execute-deploy is disabled' branch L753). A non-PASS fixture run with --execute-deploy returns 2 via L753 EVEN IF the status check at L222 were deleted — the harness stays green while the refusal teeth are gone.

WI-1/WI-3 'kill the UNDEFINED_TERM noise' read as 'suppress warnings by dumping every overlay entry into the allowlist'. decide() (L591) only WARNs on UNDEFINED_TERM, so broadening effective_structural_allowlist() removes signal, not errors — and the same trustfield/sourcea overlay JSONs that CO-4 needs as OVERCLAIM/REGULATORY BLOCK patterns get folded into the ALLOW path, defanging the one idea with regulatory teeth.

WI-6 'externalize the six hardcoded allowlists to JSON' read as 'delete the Python constants and rely on the JSON'. effective_structural_allowlist() only unions the supplement ON TOP of the hardcoded sets (L179-185) and silently skips it when SUPPLEMENT_PATH.is_file() is False, so deleting the constants shrinks the allowlist to whatever the JSON happens to contain — a downgrade dressed as a refactor. The module-global _RUNTIME_STRUCTURAL cache (L172,178) also serves stale results to any test that loads before externalization.

GV-1/B1 exit 'reproduces known-good AND rejects a known-bad' read as 'hand-author one passing fixture and one failing fixture'. Since the only real exec receipt (P0PGR-EXEC-M03) is PARTIAL and missing founder_authorization_ref + evidence_artifacts, there is NO conformant known-good on disk; the tempting shortcut is to relax the verifier (make founder_authorization_ref optional / accept re-narrated per_url markers as evidence) so a synthetic good fixture passes — which simultaneously makes the real bad receipt pass.

B0 exit 'all harnesses green on CURRENT behavior; golden baselines committed' read as 'snapshot whatever the code emits today and commit it'. A golden-only harness (TH-2 counts, TH-6 --no-llm snapshot, TH-3 current decisions) is green BY CONSTRUCTION and freezes any existing bug as the baseline; it has no fixture that can ever go red, so it certifies 'locked' without teeth.

GV-4/WI-4 'print any dangling ref' and MO-2/MO-7 'print hits' read as report-only scripts that always exit 0 — mirroring the existing audit_* motors the kit table flags as 'always exit 0, surface never gate'. A linter that cannot fail is decoration.

DX-4 'reproduces the gate's success logic' read as 're-implement deploy_success = exit0 and identity_ok and smoke_ok and post_promote_ok in the dashboard', forking a second copy of the trust rule that drifts from gates/promotion_gate.py L448.

GV-6 'assert every ADVISOR/FOUNDER_FACT id is in picks or missing_ids' read as validating only the partial_batch=False path; under the DEFAULT partial_batch=True there is no missing_ids key and unvalidated advisor items are silently dropped (L58-68), so a validator tested only on the non-default branch passes while the real leak is unguarded.
second_move_risk: After TH-1 lands as a green 'refusal teeth' harness, the next hand on promotion_gate.py (e.g., GV-5 gate-profile linter or a later tuning) can weaken REQUIRED_STATUS or the L222 status check and the suite stays green because it only pins the overloaded exit code, not the specific reason string — the load-bearing deploy boundary loses teeth with a passing test as cover.

After WI-1 broadens the allowlist to clear UNDEFINED_TERM noise, TH-3's regression harness (built on only 4 fixtures in language_gate/test_files/) can't see the change: none of clean/violations/tombstone/cold_session exercise the 165 overlay terms, so WI-1 can allowlist arbitrarily and TH-3 stays green — the 'regression guard' guards nothing over the exact edit it was meant to catch.

After GV-1 is tuned to pass a fabricated known-good, the verifier is never run against the real P0PGR-EXEC-M03 receipt, so when a future real execution emits the same shape (PARTIAL, round timestamp, no founder_authorization_ref, re-narrated markers instead of stored evidence_artifacts) it is ACCEPTED — the adversarial spine the whole B1 phase exists to build is inverted into a rubber stamp.

After WI-6 deletes the Python allowlist constants, WI-1's overlay merge and any language_gate scan silently depend on a JSON that can fail to load (is_file() False -> skipped), so a later move on a fresh checkout or a moved file path shrinks the effective allowlist, re-flagging previously-clean surfaces and generating FAIL/ WARN noise attributed to unrelated content.

After MO-6 populates one 'unknown' ROI metric and DX-6/DX-8 render 'from live JSON', the dashboards present a mostly-stub surface (write_roi_heartbeat still emits 'unknown', brain bundle_sha256=null, governance_stale_pointer_queue empty) as if complete — an empty sink renders as '0 issues / all clear' rather than 'nothing populated this'.

After DX-4 re-implements the gate success logic, a change to promotion_gate.py's invariant set two moves later leaves the auditor asserting PASS on a deploy the real gate would BLOCK — a divergence that specifically hides a regression in the trust boundary.
third_move_consequence: A defanged CO-4 (trustfield overlay wired as allowlist by WI-1 instead of block patterns) lets a real REGULATORY_COPY_RISK / RPAA MSP-PSP self-claim reach the live trustfield.ca surface uncaught — the M03 receipt shows the site already carries 'venture in formation / does not hold funds/settle / not legal advice' disclaimers whose absence is exactly what CO-4 must enforce; a false 'no overclaim' PASS becomes a regulatory-liability exposure for a live venture, not just a sandbox blemish.

A GV-1 verifier trained to accept fabricated good receipts means the founder's only guard against agent self-report theater is dead precisely when Phase-2/R-ladder execution starts emitting real receipts — the founder-control invariant (never trust a PASS without evidence) is silently voided while the scoreboard still reads TRUST-SPINE COMPLETE.

Golden-only B0 harnesses committed as 'the board is locked' give false confidence for the entire downstream sequence (BR-1 bridge, MO motors) to build on behavior that was never correctness-checked, only snapshotted — a latent DLM or language_gate misclassification propagates into every DRAFT packet the bridge emits, and the 'green baseline' is cited as proof it's safe.

Dashboards (DX-1/DX-6/DX-8) rendering stale/empty sinks as current state become the founder's decision surface; a founder reading 'governance_stale_pointer_queue: 0' as 'no stale laws' rather than 'the sweep never ran' makes a governance call on absence-of-signal — theater at the exact layer meant to restore founder oversight.

Linters that only print and exit 0 (GV-4/WI-4/MO-2/MO-7) let dangling registry refs and dead motors accumulate silently; two phases later the registry cross-consistency the CI jobs (CI-1..CI-5) are supposed to enforce is already rotten, so the 'PR gating surface' is claimed as covered while passing garbage.

chess_pass.patch_before_execution: GATE-EXEC SAFETY: never invoke promotion_gate.py with --deploy-command/--confirm-each-time/--semi-auto/--autonomous; unit-test the PURE functions (refusal_reasons/independence_refusal_reasons/source_refusal_reasons) or run flagless to APPROVED_DRY_RUN, under env with CF_MAIN_TOKEN/CF_VERIFIER_TOKEN unset and HOME on a temp dir; DX-4 re-implements success logic in a fresh read-only module OR calls the gate's own predicate/receipt, and reconciles against the recorded gate verdict (report AUDITOR_DISAGREES_WITH_GATE, never substitute its own PASS). TH-1 asserts the SPECIFIC refusal cause string plus a PASS positive control, never returncode==2 alone. NEGATIVE-PROOF (every verifier): ship a negative fixture produced by MINIMAL MUTATION of a real on-disk artifact + a committed red-run canary; positive fixture must be a minimally-mutated conformant artifact. GV-1: run against the REAL P0PGR-EXEC-M03 and record REJECTED with cited reasons; forbid relaxing any P0_EXECUTION_RECEIPT_SCHEMA required field; emit a NEW verdict receipt, never edit M03 (Lock 5). GV-6: validate a PERSISTED apply_map.json (never re-call build_apply_map), IGNORE the decision field, build the negative fixture in DEFAULT partial_batch=True with an unvalidated ADVISOR/FOUNDER_FACT item and assert it is flagged as silently dropped; invariants: machine_closed never intersects picks, FORM_OFFICIAL implies status in {READY,EMPTY,BLOCKED_UNVALIDATED} with no submit/dispatch_now field, every ADVISOR/FOUNDER_FACT id in picks or an explicit deferred_unvalidated list; do NOT relax to pass current behavior. BR-1: consume ONLY a GV-6-passed apply_map.json (refuse classify/.processed.json), bridge only MACHINE_VALIDATABLE + validated advisor picks, EXCLUDE FOUNDER_FACT and unvalidated advisor items, hardcode packet status=DRAFT and dispatch_now=false regardless of apply-map status, carry classification_reason+evidence provenance, and emit a machine_closed_without_founder manifest for founder eyes. RECEIPT HYGIENE: every sandbox verifier (GV-1/GV-6/DX-4/BR-4/MO-8) stamps origin=sandbox-advisory, authority=none, verdict vocab CHECK_OK/CHECK_REJECTED (never PASS); TH-2 golden namespaces DLM stage decision:PASS to STAGE_OK. OVERLAY/ALLOWLIST (WI-1/WI-3/WI-6): intent-classify entries — allow-terms to allowlist, regulatory/overclaim terms to BLOCK; EXCLUDE CONFLICT_PHRASE/REGULATORY_COPY_RISK; externalization is ADDITIVE-PARITY (assert set byte-identical to hardcoded constants before removing any, keep constants as fallback, reset _RUNTIME caches); add a regression assert that a known RPAA/MSP/PSP overclaim still FAILs and a legitimately-undefined term still WARNs; consume/annotate overlays and the 92 sidecars in place, never delete (Lock 5). LINTERS (GV-4/WI-4/MO-2/MO-7): exit NONZERO on any hit, prove RED-before-GREEN on a seeded bad ref; MO-7 needs a positive-control stale-law surface. MO-8: keep queue [] on disk, run only against a synthetic /tmp draft (fake icp id, example.com), assert highest state reached is founder_blocked, never call any send/broadcast tool, output labeled 'readiness score, NOT send authorization'. MO-6: derive blocker_count from LOCAL receipts only, never open Supabase/cost_event, keep no-fabrication ('unknown' if underivable), append never overwrite (Lock 5). CI-1..CI-5: permissions contents:read only, trigger on: pull_request (never pull_request_target/push/schedule), NO secrets/env credential refs, scripts report-only (--json, no --write-*), non-blocking (Lock 4); do not touch brain-loop-autorun-v1.yml or uncomment cron. CI-4 git-hooks: ship standalone founder-run CLI, never set core.hooksPath or add a hooks-present check (Lock 8). CO-4: SPLIT into CO-4a (offline block-pattern engine + dry-run REGULATORY_COPY_RISK report over a CHECKED-IN fixture, banner 'lint result, not a legal/compliance determination') and CO-4b (any live-surface wiring = founder-gated ASK); never open/cd/write TrustField-Technologies or trustfield.ca; author no RPAA/FINTRAC/MSB status assertions. CO-1/CO-2/CO-3 + all DX/CO HTML: write to local out/ with a visible 'DO NOT PUSH — not for public hosting' banner (Lock 10), never Cloudflare www/Railway/Vercel (Lock 9); render Tier-3/4 as LOCKED/proof-gated; run language_gate over the generated HTML and require clean pass before done; CO-3 hardcode the synthetic fixture path, forbid real token-log ingestion, watermark leak_rate 'SYNTHETIC — not a guaranteed-savings claim'. DX-3: de-pin = swap the hardcoded REPO constant for a git-rev-parse/bundle-relative resolver (never delete the .app); move to front of B2 with edge DX-3->DX-1/DX-2/DX-6. SEQUENCING: freeze TH-1/TH-2/TH-3 goldens in B0 before any WI-1/WI-3/WI-6 merge (a post-wiring golden diff means INVESTIGATE, never re-baseline); enforce GV-2->BR-4 and GV-1/BR-3->MO-1 order; add WI-3->CO-1/CO-2/CO-3 gate-clean edge; pull CO-1 into a parallel revenue lane after B0. CLASSIFIER + FENCE EDITS ARE FOUNDER-GATED: flag (do not silently edit) the classify_item early-return so a CLUSTER-DICT-FIX match never overrides a FOUNDER_FACT match, and any edit to build_apply_map fence semantics (deferred_unvalidated surfacing, BLOCKED_UNVALIDATED branch, machine_closed field, partial_batch default) routes to the founder. GLOBAL: run all phases with CF/Supabase secrets absent; treat every live URL (workers.dev, *.supabase.co, trustfield.ca, api.github.com App) as out-of-bounds for automated calls; do not git push this worktree (Lock 9).
